landing.heroSub: Manage supplier invoices, track daily sales, control costs and understand your business — all in one place.
landing.trustLine: 14-day free trial · Cancel anytime · GDPR compliant · Made for European restaurants
landing.trustedBy: Trusted by restaurant owners across Portugal
landing.contactSub: Have a question or need help? Send us a message.
landing.messageSent: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
landing.problemTitle: Paper invoices. WhatsApp photos. Excel sheets. Sound familiar?
landing.problem1Title: You don't know your real food cost until month end
landing.problem1Sub: Every purchase stays on paper. By the time you add it up, the month is gone.
landing.problem2Title: Supplier invoices pile up and never get digitised
landing.problem2Sub: Boxes of paper invoices. No searchable history. No idea what you paid last month.
landing.problem3Title: You have no idea which days or dishes make the most money
landing.problem3Sub: Without daily data you can't improve what you can't measure.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.featuresSub: Built specifically for small restaurant operators — not enterprise software in disguise.
landing.feature1Desc: Photograph any supplier invoice. AI extracts every line item, price, tax, NIF and IBAN automatically. Build your supplier database without typing a single character.
landing.feature2Desc: Log cash and card sales in seconds. Scan your POS daily report with AI. Track staff attendance. See your day's performance the moment you close.
landing.feature3Desc: Revenue trends, cost breakdowns, profit margins and supplier spend — filtered by venue, date range or custom period. Know your numbers without an accountant.
landing.feature4Desc: Generate professional PDF-ready business reports. Sales, expenses, staff attendance or full audit — export exactly what you need, when you need it.
landing.feature5Desc: One account for all your locations. Switch between venues instantly. Data always separated, overview always unified.
landing.pricingSub: 14-day free trial on all paid plans. No credit card required to start.
landing.faq1Q: Do I need a credit card to start?
landing.faq1A: No, the 14-day trial is completely free. A card is only needed when you upgrade.
landing.faq2A: Yes. All data is encrypted and stored in European servers. We are fully GDPR compliant.
landing.faq3Q: Can I use it for multiple restaurants?
landing.faq3A: Yes, the Growth plan supports up to 3 venues and Pro supports unlimited.
landing.faq4A: Yes. Subscribers can export Sales, Expenses, Staff and full Audit reports as print-ready documents. Free accounts have access to weekly data.
landing.faq5A: Yes, cancel from your account settings at any time. No lock-in contracts.
landing.faq6A: Currently English and Portuguese. More languages are on the roadmap.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take control of your costs?
landing.ctaSub: Join hundreds of restaurant owners who stopped guessing and started knowing.
landing.testimonialSub: Join hundreds of operators across Portugal who use Apex Manager every day.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Finally I know my actual costs without spending hours in Excel. The invoice scanning alone is worth every cent.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I manage 3 restaurants and this is the first tool that actually makes multi-venue management feel simple.
landing.testimonial3Quote: Scanning invoices with my phone and having everything organised automatically changed how I run my kitchen.
landing.beforeAfterSub: From chaos to clarity. The transformation takes minutes.
landing.beforeLabel: Invoices in a drawer. Costs unknown. Stress high.
landing.afterLabel: Everything organised. Costs tracked. Profit visible.
landing.heroDashboardLabel: Dashboard with sales data, revenue chart and cost breakdown
landing.beforeImageLabel: Scattered paper invoices, messy Excel spreadsheet, WhatsApp messages about prices
landing.afterImageLabel: Clean Apex Manager dashboard with organised invoices, charts and clear profit visibility
